ops.title: Phase 4a digest: loyalty registry + travel_instruments (v2)
ops.body:
# Phase 4a consolidated digest ‚Äî B1‚ÄìB3 + cutover + Wyndham (2026-07-13)

All values verified via web 2026-07-13; sources per row in transfer_partners.json/points_pricing.json notes.

## (1) Transfer-partner rows added (bank‚Üíhotel; ratio = bank:hotel)
- amex‚Üíhilton 1:2; amex‚Üímarriott 1:1; amex‚Üíchoice 1:1. Amex is NOT a partner of wyndham/hyatt/ihg.
- chase‚Üíhyatt 1:1 (note: Sapphire Reserve stays 1:1; Sapphire Preferred + Ink Business Preferred are 4:3 for applications on/after 2026-06-15, existing SP holders convert 1:1‚Üí4:3 on 2026-10-01); chase‚Üíihg 1:1; chase‚Üímarriott 1:1; chase‚Üíwyndham 1:1 (Chase's first new partner since 2021, added 2026-02-25). All chase rows: 1,000-pt increments, transfer-eligible card required.
- citi‚Üíchoice 1:1.5 (devalued from 1:2 on 2026-04-19; premium ThankYou card required); citi‚Üíwyndham 1:1 (same card requirement).
- capitalone‚Üíchoice 1:1; capitalone‚Üíwyndham 1:1.
- Reachability: hyatt‚Üêchase; hilton‚Üêamex; marriott‚Üêamex,chase; ihg‚Üêchase; choice‚Üêamex,citi,capitalone; wyndham‚Üêchase,citi,capitalone.
- Excluded deliberately: Bilt Rewards (no bank entity in the registry).

## (2) points_pricing rows (buy¬¢ / sale¬¢ / annual cap ‚Äî cadence)
hyatt 2.6/2.1/55k (rare, shallow); hilton 1.0/0.5/160k‚Üí240k promo (near-constant 100% bonuses); marriott 1.25/0.8/150k (frequent ~40% bonus); ihg 1.0/0.5/150k‚Üí200k promo (very frequent 80‚Äì100%); choice 1.1/0.74/180k (~monthly 35‚Äì40%); wyndham 1.3/0.72/100k‚Üí200k promo (near-continuous 70‚Äì100% targeted). Test-enforced invariant: every program has a points_pricing row and sells_points agrees between files (34 programs).

## (3) travel_instruments schema as implemented
`credits`‚Üí`travel_instruments`; `credit_*`‚Üí`instrument_*`; id server-generated (uuid hex[:8]), caller-supplied id rejected; dispatch on `type`.
- monetary_credit: {id, type, issuer(free-text), amount(>0), currency, expires[, note]}
- hotel_night_certificate: {id, type, program(MUST be hotel registry slug), nights(int‚â•1), cap: {type:"points",points‚â•1}|{type:"category",category}|{type:"anytime"}, expires[, note]}
- companion_fare: {id, type, issuer, expires[, note]} ‚Äî NO amount/currency.
Write-boundary rejections (UsageError, exit 64): unknown/missing type; missing/extra keys per variant; cert program not a hotel; nights<1; bad cap; amount‚â§0/non-number; caller id. CLI: `prefs instrument-add` (one JSON object on stdin), `instrument-list [--expiring-within 90d]`, `instrument-remove <id>`.
CUTOVER: any pre-v2 doc (has `credits` or lacks `travel_instruments`) rejected on EVERY read/write path with StateConflictError (exit 3): "preferences use a pre-v2 shape (the credits list became travel_instruments); delete <prefs_path> and re-run getaway onboarding". No migration, no alias.

## (4) Registry command surfaces
- `registry programs` gains `--kind airline|hotel`, `--rooms-aero` (composable with `--domains`; `--domains` output shape unchanged ‚Äî Gmail-sender source).
- NEW `registry hosts [--kind airline|hotel|bank] [--gather-auth cookie|token|device_wall]` ‚Üí [{slug, kind, gather_auth, hosts:[‚Ä¶]}] ‚Äî the single seam for the browser read's host list + auth routing (38 rows: 34 programs + 4 banks; banks carry [domain, dashboard_host]).
- `registry banks` output includes gather_auth.
- Helpers: registry.programs_by_kind(kind), registry.gather_hosts(), registry.GATHER_AUTH_CLASSES.
- gather_auth classes (test-asserted): token = delta, american, united, jetblue, aeroplan, qatar, singapore + capitalone(bank); device_wall = amex(bank); cookie = everything else incl. all 6 hotels, chase, citi.

## (5) Phase-8 doc deltas (complete list)
**gather.md "Program and bank registries":** keep `registry programs --domains` (Gmail from:) + `registry banks`; ADD `registry hosts` as the browser-read host list with gather_auth; hotel hosts join via --kind hotel; state the two projections' distinct purposes.
**gather.md "Browser read":** route by gather_auth ‚Äî cookie ‚Üí seeded session (today's path); token (delta/american/united/jetblue/aeroplan/qatar/singapore/capitalone) + device_wall (amex) ‚Üí live Arc CDP attach. DELETE the v1 "lands logged-out despite fresh cookies: skip the host" line and its re-login advice (v1 mislabeled structural failures). Failure messaging distinguishes STRUCTURAL vs TRANSIENT. Consolidated retry pass runs off an explicit per-host ledger (capitalone silently dropped in v1). --reason spans airline+hotel+bank hosts.
**gather.md "Credits mining":** `credit-add` flags ‚Üí `prefs instrument-add` with one JSON object on stdin; drop the kind vocabulary (voucher/credit/certificate/companion) for the tagged-union types; id CLI-generated; hotel domains join the sender list via --kind hotel --domains; add hotel subject terms (free-night award/certificate, anniversary night, "Category 1-4", elite-night credit).
**onboard + refresh SKILL.md:** one hotels balance field from `registry programs --kind hotel` (6 hotels) into the single balances.programs map; hotel elite tiers in statuses (Globalist, Diamond, Titanium/Ambassador, IHG Diamond, Wyndham Diamond); gather_auth routing + per-host ledger mirrored; travel_instruments form section replaces credits(kind); onboarding asks for missing expiry, refresh keeps on-file; refresh cert-mining captures hotel free-night certs.
**planning.md + SKILL.md CLI map:** one balances.programs map narrative (no is_hotel()); hotels as transfer targets; credits‚Üítravel_instruments everywhere; CLI map adds registry hosts / --kind / --rooms-aero / instrument-*, removes credit-*.

## Open verification items
- All 6 hotel sites classified gather_auth: cookie by default ‚Äî no evidence of token auth; reclassify per-slug (one-field data edit) if a live refresh lands logged-out with fresh cookies.
- Wyndham's rooms.aero `source` slug recorded as "wyndham", observed-pending-confirmation by a live capture (Phase 6 stays-ingest concern).
ops.when: Writing the getaway v2 docs sweep (gather.md, onboard/refresh SKILL.md, planning.md, SKILL.md CLI map) or reviewing the Phase 4a registry/instruments diff ‚Äî this is the implementing agent's consolidated digest with verified ratios, schema shapes, and the complete doc-delta list.
